This data has a specific DID, due to plant constraints => Allo

Alignment_State.comment: Alignment state of the radar at each trip start

DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Param_veh_2.Steer_gear_ratio.comment: Gear between angle of steering wheel and steering angle

Param_veh_2.RPLB.comment:
"1 = Mounted with connector down (towards ground)
-1 = Mounted with connector up (towards sky)"

Safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_FourWVehicleSp.comment: Parameter allowing to enable  clock check.
Parameter allowing to enable  checksum check.

Safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_SwaClockCheckE.comment: Parameter allowing to enable  clock check.

Safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_SwaChecksumChe.comment: Parameter allowing to enable  checksum check.

Safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_BrakeControlR1.comment: Parameter allowing to enable  clock check.
Parameter allowing to enable  checksum check.

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

systemSupplierIdentifier.comment: Name and address information of the supplier.

Plant Alignment checking.Horizontal Alig.comment: Right is Positive, Left is NEGATIVE This is the current offset after RunTime

Plant Alignment checking.Vertical Alignm.comment: up is positive, down is negative This is the current offset after Run Time

CW_track.CW_angle.comment:
"angle to track (not curve corrected) (positive = track on the
right)"

CW_track.CW_lat_speed.comment: lateral speed of track (positive = track moving to the right)

CW_track.CW_stationary_object.comment:
"stationary object means not moving, and has never been seen
moving in the past.
0 = no stationary o

CW_track.CW_new_track.comment:
"f a new object is recognized this bit is set for two cycles
0 = no new track
1 = new track"

Architecture_Type.comment: Alignment state of the radar at each trip start

Param_Sensor.ElevationMountingPosRadarSe.comment: Elevation mounting position of radar sensor (distance to road plane)

Param_Sensor.LongiMountingPosRadarSensor.comment: Longitudinal mounting position of radar sensor (distance to rear axis)

Param_veh_1.Longitudinal_Displacement.comment: Longitudinal displacment related to vehicle center of gravity

Param_veh_1.AxisLoadDistr.comment: The ratio of the vertical load at rear axle to total vehicle vertical load

Param_veh_1.Sterring Ratio.comment: The ratio between steering wheel angle and the steer angle.

Param_veh_1.Lateral_displacement.comment: Lateral displacement related to vehicle reference point

Param_veh_1.WhlTcksPerRev.comment: Number of sensor pulses per wheel revolution

Param_veh_1.Overhang.comment: Longitudinal distance from the center of front axle group to the front most point

Param_veh_1.PitchAngle.comment: Angular displacement about sensor lateral axis (+ down)

Param_veh_1.RollAngle.comment: Angular displacement about sensor longitudinal axis

Param_veh_1.YawAngle.comment: Angular displacemnt about vehicle vertical axis

Param_veh_1.CoverDamping.comment: Attenuation of secondary surface (two-way) in dB
